title: Bispecific antibodies - Nature Biotechnology
gist: A one-line patent digest entry noting recent patents relating to bispecific antibody compositions and methods of use; the substantive content is paywalled and no specific patents, assignees or claims are disclosed in the available text.

insights.claim: Nature Biotechnology's patent digest for this issue covers recent patents relating to bispecific antibody compositions and their methods of use, though the specific patents and assignees are not disclosed in the available text.
insights.speaker: Nature Biotechnology
insights.so_what: Continued dedicated patent-digest coverage signals bispecific antibodies remain an active area of IP filing, but this excerpt lacks the specific assignees or claims needed for actionable diligence — the full patent listing behind the paywall would be needed.
insights.quote: Recent patents relating to bispecific antibody compositions and methods of use.
